misc.title: OFFICIAL: Gintama creator Hideaki Sorachi is starting a new manga titled “2-nen B-gumi Yusha Destroyers” (Class 2-B Hero Destroyers) in Weekly Shonen Jump, beginning on April 20. This will be Sorachi’
misc.text: OFFICIAL: Gintama creator Hideaki Sorachi is starting a new manga titled “2-nen B-gumi Yusha Destroyers” (Class 2-B Hero Destroyers) in Weekly Shonen Jump, beginning on April 20. This will be Sorachi’s first new serialized manga in about seven years since Gintama concluded in June 2019.

items.title: OFFICIAL: Gintama creator Hideaki Sorachi is starting a new manga titled “2-nen B-gumi Yusha Destroyers” (Class 2-B Hero Destroyers) in Weekly Shonen Jump, beginning on April 20. This will be Sorachi’
items.text: OFFICIAL: Gintama creator Hideaki Sorachi is starting a new manga titled “2-nen B-gumi Yusha Destroyers” (Class 2-B Hero Destroyers) in Weekly Shonen Jump, beginning on April 20. This will be Sorachi’s first new serialized manga in about seven years since Gintama concluded in June 2019.
